attacking_style: Exploits chaotic sprint situations with improvised attacks through middle gaps, using explosive power and elite bike handling to capitalize on disorganized positioning.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Excels in technical, chaotic sprint finishes where bike handling and improvisation matter more than pure power or organization.
vulnerability: Likely struggles in highly organized, leadout-dominated sprints where chaos and improvisation opportunities are minimized.
key_patterns: Attacks through middle traffic gaps when sprints become disorganized
Uses Venezuelan national champion-level bike handling in chaotic positioning
Demonstrates explosive power in improvised sprint scenarios
form_trajectory: positive: showed race-winning potential through chaos exploitation in 2023 Vuelta
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7
